title: test horror mod
description: just your average the broken script inspired mod
body:
### HEAVILY WORK IN PROGRESS, ALOT OF CONTENT IS STILL IN THE WORKS! (some stuff could also break)

 

# 1.0.0 part 1 is out now!

 

also go play the broken script, its a very awesome mod and i 100% recommend to check it out.


all models and assets in this mod were made by myself, some being heavily inspired from the broken script though

this mod adds alot of tbs inspired content

this mod adds a brand new dimension

this mod as of now adds 4 entities, each doing their own thing

mod commands:
/forceevent (forces a random event to happen),

/seteventfrequency (changes the chance of an event to happen per tick (minimum 0, maximum 1)


spoilers ahead!

 

 

 

entities:

 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

the shadow: spawns randomly at night, when coming close will turn into either chase or fake, fake despawns and chase deals damage upon contact)

From the abyss: currently this entity's only behavior is to hide in the caves, when looking at it it will go into chase behavior and track you down

Valo (easter egg): spawns only when saying Valo in chat, kinda buggy in multiplayer, when Valo is said valo will join your game, make you unable to move and slowly track you down.

Zero (VERY WIP): after about 5 seconds a weird player known as Zero joins your game, Zero will react to some things when said to the player (examples include: Hello, Who are you? and more)

current zero variants:
zero wandering: wanders around in zero torture

</details>
